name: dvv_freqmin
definition: Lower frequency bound (Hz) for dv/v extraction from the WCT-DTT output. Can be a subset of the parent wct_dtt computation band — enables multi-band analysis from one broadband WCT run.

name: dvv_freqmax
definition: Upper frequency bound (Hz) for dv/v extraction. Multiple wavelet_dtt_dvv configsets with different freqmin/freqmax can be linked to the same wct_dtt step.

name: dvv_freq_agg
definition: How to collapse the frequency dimension to a scalar dv/v time series: mean or median over the selected band.

name: dvv_quality_min
definition: Minimum wavelet coherence (coh) to include a time-frequency cell before frequency averaging. Cells below this threshold are masked.

name: dvv_split_pair_type
definition: Split dv/v by pair type (CC/SC/AC) separately. CC=inter-station; SC=same station different location; AC=autocorrelation.

name: dvv_split_components
definition: Split dv/v by component pair (ZZ/RR/TT/etc) separately.

name: dvv_weighted_mean
definition: Compute 1/err^2 weighted mean across pairs after frequency averaging.

name: dvv_trimmed_mean
definition: Compute trimmed mean: reject pairs whose dv/v deviates more than dvv_trim_limit sigma from the mean.

name: dvv_percentiles
definition: Comma-separated list of percentiles to save (e.g. 5,25,75,95).
